view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for automatic link generation at booking confirmation is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for automatic link generation at booking confirmation is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided in the linked use case clearly demonstrates that the system automatically creates a unique Zoom meeting room and generates a link, which is included in the confirmation email. This directly supports the requirement of automatic link generation at booking confirmation. The specific scenario outlined in the use case confirms that the functionality is implemented as required.
